markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.076 — Ballot Proposition

The ballot at the election shall be printed to provide for voting for or against the proposition: “Granting of a franchise (brief description of the franchise and its terms).”

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
